[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: scenarios] Can an unprivileged external user inject a scenario with `properties` map containing thousands of key-value pairs, causing the `ScenarioPropertiesAggregator` to iterate over all entries and consume excessive memory and CPU during scenario initialization?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Function: validate()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a `scenarios` map where `StringUtils::isBlank` returns `true` for a key that is not actually empty (e.g., a string of zero-width non-breaking spaces), causing the `IllegalArgumentException` to be thrown and preventing startup even with a seemingly valid configuration?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: scenarios] Can an unprivileged external user inject a scenario with `enabled=false` to silently disable a critical monitoring scenario without triggering any alert, causing the monitor to stop verifying network health for that transaction type without operator awareness?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: responseThreads] Can an unprivileged external user set `responseThreads` to a value much larger than `clients`, causing the resolver thread pool to be starved of work and wasting JVM thread resources while the publisher thread pool becomes the bottleneck?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: '] [Field: batchDivisor] Can an unprivileged external user set `batchDivisor` to `Integer.MAX_VALUE` to minimize batch sizes to 1, combined with a very high `tps` value, causing the `RateLimiter.acquire(1)` to be called at maximum frequency and creating excessive lock contention in the rate limiter?
